name: cvar_5pct_replay_determinism_standard
description: Inputs for M2 cvar_5pct bit-identical replay test (plan deliverable 3). Same (cycle_id, holdings, historical_data) must yield bit-identical cvar_5pct and cvar_n_tail across two independent calls. No expected values — reproducibility is asserted as run_a == run_b (PA-18 compliance).
notes: PA-18: no cvar_5pct or cvar_n_tail expected literals. The test asserts bit-equality of two independent calls with the same cycle_id-seeded RNG. The seed is derive_cycle_mc_seed(cycle_id) — the Phase-1 anchor. 50 days > MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS ensures eligible pool is non-empty.
derivation: 50 days > MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS=20 + (VOL_WINDOW-1) so eligible pool is non-empty. cycle_id is a canonical YYYYMMDD_HHMM string. seed = derive_cycle_mc_seed(cycle_id). Two independent compute_portfolio_cvar calls with this cycle_id + same inputs must produce bit-identical cvar_5pct and cvar_n_tail. No expected values present — PA-18.
